landing.heroAlt: YoBoss — Your team planning and executing together
landing.heroTagline: Describe your goal and your digital employees plan & execute
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to actually finish what you start
landing.featuresSubtitle: YoBoss turns one big goal into a phased roadmap, a weekly schedule, and a small team of digital employees that ship real work alongside you.
landing.feature1Title: Turn any ambition into a clear plan
landing.feature1Body: Tell your team where you want to land. They come back with a phased roadmap and milestones you can edit, reorder, or rip up. The blank-page problem, solved.
landing.feature2Body: Every Monday your team drafts the week — concrete tasks slotted into real time blocks. Miss a day? They re-plan around it, no guilt trip.
landing.feature3Body: Hire General Assistant, Content Writer, Market Researcher, and more. Each one ships output you can download.
landing.feature4Body: Ask for a pitch deck, an interview script, or a spreadsheet — your team writes the code, runs it, and hands you the file.
landing.feature5Body: Every conversation about your goal lives in one shared space. Your team always knows your roadmap, this week's plan, and what you shipped yesterday — so you never re-explain.
landing.feature6Title: Pay only for what you use
landing.feature6Body: Free tier covers casual use. Upgrade or top up with credits — no surprise bills, full visibility on usage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: When you sign up we store the email address and (where provided) the name and avatar from your authentication provider. While you use YoBoss we store the goals, phases, tasks, notes, and chat messages you create. Anonymized usage telemetry (request counts, model tokens) is recorded for billing and quality monitoring.
privacy.s2L1: Operate the product — render your data back to you and run AI requests on your behalf.
privacy.s2L2: Bill subscriptions and credit purchases through Stripe.
privacy.s2L3: Send essential transactional email (auth confirmations, billing receipts).
privacy.s2L4: Investigate bugs and improve product quality. We never sell your data.
privacy.s3Body: YoBoss runs on top of these services. Each receives only what it needs to do its job:
privacy.s3L2Body: — your chat content is sent to the Claude API to generate AI responses.
privacy.s3L3Body: — payment processing for subscriptions and credits. We never see your card details.
privacy.s3L4Body: — application hosting and edge runtime logs.
privacy.s4Body: Your data persists for as long as your account is active. You may delete individual goals, tasks, and chat sessions from inside the app. To delete your entire account and all associated data, use the Delete account button on the Account page — the deletion is immediate, cascades through all our databases, and cancels any active subscription.
privacy.s5Body: Files produced by AI code execution are held by Anthropic for a limited window (typically 30 days from creation) and then expire. Download what you want to keep long-term.
privacy.s6Body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time. The Account page has self-service buttons to export all your data as a JSON file and to delete your account; both run instantly without contacting support.
privacy.s7Body: We use first-party cookies only — strictly necessary cookies for authentication (session tokens) and preference cookies (UI state). On first visit a banner asks for consent before we enable optional analytics (Vercel Analytics) and error replays (Sentry). You can decline either; essential authentication cookies always run. No advertising or tracking cookies.
privacy.s8Body: Questions or requests about your data? Email

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By creating a YoBoss account or using the service you agree to these Terms. If you don't agree, don't use the service.
terms.s2Body: YoBoss is a goal-planning and AI-assisted task-management product. Features and capabilities may evolve over time. We aim to give reasonable advance notice before removing or materially changing features paid users rely on.
terms.s3L1: You are responsible for the activity under your account.
terms.s3L2: Don't share credentials. One human per account.
terms.s3L4: You must be at least 13 years old (or the digital-consent age in your jurisdiction).
terms.s4Body: You agree NOT to use YoBoss to:
terms.s4L1Post: — illegal content, child sexual abuse material, content designed to harass, deceive, or harm.
terms.s4L2: Reverse-engineer, scrape, or abuse the service.
terms.s4L3: Attempt to bypass rate limits, quotas, or billing.
terms.s4L4: Use the service to build a competing product without written permission.
terms.s4Footer: Violation of this section may result in immediate account suspension without refund.
terms.s5L1: Paid plans renew automatically each billing period until you cancel.
terms.s5L2: You can cancel at any time from the Account page; access continues through the end of the paid period.
terms.s5L3: Credit packs are non-refundable once purchased.
terms.s5L4: Prices may change; we'll notify you at least 14 days before any increase to your subscription.
terms.s6Body: You retain ownership of the goals, plans, and content you create. You grant YoBoss a limited license to store, display, and process that content solely to operate the service for you (including sending it to AI providers to generate responses).
terms.s7Body: AI-generated content can be wrong, biased, or outdated. Don't rely on it for medical, legal, financial, or safety-critical decisions without professional review. You're responsible for evaluating AI output before acting on it.
terms.s8Body: You can delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or expose us to legal risk.
terms.s9Body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, YoBoss is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability for any claim related to the service is capped at the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.s10Body: We may update these Terms. Material changes will be announced via email or in-app notice at least 14 days before they take effect.
